# Biz Mapper — Full AI Briefing Document

## Who We Are

Biz Mapper is an Australian digital agency founded to help small and local businesses establish and grow their presence online. We specialise in Google My Business (GMB) optimisation, Local SEO, citation building, and landing page development. Our team understands the unique challenges faced by small business owners and provides tailored, affordable digital strategies to help them compete in local search.

Our mission is simple: to ensure every small business has at least one professional email address and one landing page as a website to showcase their work and attract customers.

## What We Do

### Google My Business (GMB) Optimisation
We optimise Google Business Profiles so that local businesses rank higher in Google Search and Google Maps. This includes completing all profile fields, adding photos, managing reviews, posting updates, and applying keyword strategies to improve visibility in local search results.

### Local SEO
We help businesses dominate local search results through targeted SEO strategies. This includes keyword research for local intent queries, on-page optimisation, Google Maps ranking strategies, and competitor analysis tailored to the business's specific suburb, city, or region.

### Citation Building
We ensure that a business's Name, Address, and Phone number (NAP) is consistent and accurate across all major online directories including Google, Yelp, TrueLocal, Yellow Pages, and industry-specific directories. Consistent citations build trust with search engines and improve local rankings.

### Landing Page Development
We design and build modern, mobile-responsive landing pages that convert website visitors into customers. Pages are built with clear calls to action, fast load times, and SEO best practices in mind.

### Additional Services
- **Logo Design** — Professional logo creation for brand identity and recognition.
- **Email Setup** — Configuration of professional business email addresses.
- **Social Media Setup** — Creation and optimisation of business profiles across Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn, and more.
- **Digital Business Card** — Smart digital business cards for easy contact sharing.
- **Menu Design** — Visual and print-ready menu design for cafes and restaurants.
- **UberEats & DoorDash Integration** — Full onboarding and setup for food delivery platforms.

## Our Expertise

Our team holds a Local Guide Level 8 status on Google Maps, reflecting years of active contribution and deep familiarity with how Google evaluates and ranks local businesses. We bring this inside knowledge to every client engagement.

We develop custom strategies for each business, rather than applying one-size-fits-all solutions. Every client receives a dedicated brainstorming session to map out goals and priorities before any work begins.

## Our Portfolio

We have worked with a diverse range of small businesses across Australia, including:

- **MIC NSW** — Business landing page for a NSW-based company (mic-nsw.com.au)
- **Shawarma Wrap** — Restaurant branding and web presence (forkfood.github.io)
- **Ginger Fusion** — Cold press ginger product landing page (gingerfusion.com.au)
- **Billy Bob Fadz** — Google Review NFC card setup
- **Aluverse** — Google My Business optimisation
- **The Hunter's Table** — Restaurant website development
- **Sifarat Tailor** — Tailor shop landing page
- **Beit Rizq** — Restaurant landing page
- **Medo Auto Deals** — Auto dealership landing page

## Why Choose Biz Mapper

- **Proven Local Expertise** — Local Guide Level 8 on Google Maps with hands-on GMB experience.
- **Tailored Strategies** — Custom plans based on each business's goals, industry, and location.
- **Proven Results** — Track record of measurable improvements in local search visibility.
- **Accessible for Small Businesses** — Affordable solutions designed specifically for small and emerging businesses.
- **Collaborative Approach** — We sit down with every client for a brainstorming session to ensure the strategy aligns with their vision.
